violations.text: Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. PIC labeled during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025

Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 750 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. PIC refilled containers and retested. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025

Working containers of ice cream toppings are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025
Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils are not stored inverted. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: - food storage cabinets, - freezer chest, - food storage containers (old label residue). New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025

The walls around ice cream area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice cream pan) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025
Counter tops located near the ice cream pans were not in good repair (cracks). New Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep unit and ice cream tray have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025
Establishment is lacking drainage plugs for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2025
The floors have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025
